value.raw:
LIST {
new_todo(title: TEXT { Buy groceries })
new_todo(title: TEXT { Clean room })
}
|> List/append(item: title_to_add |> new_todo(title: PASSED))
|> List/remove(item, on: item.sources.remove_button.event.press)
|> List/remove(item, on: store.sources.clear_completed_button.event.press |> THEN { item.completed |> WHEN { True => [] False => SKIP } })

body.raw: state |> WHEN { True => False False => True }

stages.raw: THEN { state |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }

branches.raw: sources.checkbox.event.click |> THEN { state |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }

body.raw: store.all_completed |> WHEN { True => False False => True }

stages.raw: THEN { store.all_completed |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }

branches.raw: store.sources.toggle_all_checkbox.event.click |> THEN { store.all_completed |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }

body.raw:
[
    sources:
        checkbox:
            event:
                click: SOURCE
        remove_button:
            event:
                press: SOURCE
        edit_input:
            text: SOURCE
            event:
                change: SOURCE
                key_down:
                    key: SOURCE
                blur: SOURCE
    title: title
    completed:
        False |> HOLD state {
            LATEST {
                sources.checkbox.event.click |> THEN { state |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }
                store.sources.toggle_all_checkbox.event.click |> THEN { store.all_completed |> WHEN { True => False False => True } }
            }
        }
]

trimmed |> Text/is_not_empty() |> WHEN { True => trimmed False => SKIP }
|> List/remove(item, on: store.sources.clear_completed_button.event.press |> THEN { item.completed |> WHEN { True => [] False => SKIP } })
completed_todos_count: todos |> List/retain(item, if: item.completed) |> List/count()
